currentMainHead.subject: Add bird-scare squeak and improve modal touch UX (#97, #98) (#99)

conclusion: #99 is no longer in the open queue, but it did not fully subsume #101 and #102.
#101 still contains follow-up gameplay and copy changes not present on main, including mobile swipe-down squeak behaviour and related help/journal updates.
#102 still contains follow-up accessibility and dismissal behaviour not present on main, including 24x24 checkbox targets, overlay-click dismissal, and the matching Palette-Rat journal note.
Both #101 and #102 are now DIRTY against main, so execute mode must plan rebases and explicit force-push approval before integration.
#14 remains outside this run and should keep manual-follow-up.
